mapreducescript.name: WOTree - Apply Start Date Changes (Map/Reduce)
mapreducescript.description: Applies queued Work Order Start Date changes from the WOTree Suitelet. Triggered programmatically via N/task, not on a schedule.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree MR: Staging File Internal ID
scriptcustomfield.description: Set programmatically per invocation via task.create params - not intended to be edited manually.
